description: <onIdle> misplaced inside a state-child body (§51.0.R). <onIdle> is a per-engine machine-wide watchdog, legal ONLY at engine-root scope (sibling of state-children). Placed inside the <Active> state-child body it fires E-IDLE-MISPLACED (the §34 error partition). For per-state timer semantics, use <onTimeout> instead.
rationale: §51.0.R <onIdle> placement is engine-root-scope ONLY; inside a state-child body -> E-IDLE-MISPLACED.
